extDesc.message: Automatically finds and highlights saved keywords on the current page. Useful for skimming and reviewing text.

keyboardHelp.message: Use Tab to move between controls. Press Enter or Space to activate buttons.

onboardingGuide.message: First step: add one word you want to find, then try the marker on this page.

noWords.message: No keywords yet. Add a keyword you want to find on the page.

emptyStateDescription.message: Save keywords you want to find; matching text on the page will be highlighted.

emptyStateGuide.message: Enter a keyword in the field and choose Add to get started.

emptyStateExample.message: Examples: a product name, project name, or phrase to review.

emptyStateAction.message: Use the field above to add your first keyword.

limitReachedOne.message: The free plan lets you save up to $LIMIT$ keyword.

limitReachedOther.message: The free plan lets you save up to $LIMIT$ keywords.

trialPeriodOne.message: $DAYS$ day left in the free trial.

trialPeriodOther.message: $DAYS$ days left in the free trial.
